name: Angel Hair Pasta with Lemon & Garlic
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring a large pot of water to a boil over high heat and maintain at a boil.
2. In a sauté pan, add olive oil and garlic. Cook over medium heat until the garlic begins to brown. Remove from the heat.
3. Pour in the white wine. Return the pan to the heat. Cook for 1-2 minutes until the wine is reduced by half.
4. Stir in lemon juice and chopped tomato. Remove from the heat.
5. Add pasta to boiling water and cook to desired doneness (30 seconds to 1 minute). Drain the pasta and transfer to a warm serving bowl.
6. Mix in basil, Parmesan cheese, black pepper, and tomato mixture. Toss and serve immediately.
